title: Gold Pull Bows Large 50mm Pack of 2 Luxury Ribbon Bows for Gift Wrapping Wedding Decor Baskets Bouquet Presentation
features: EFFORTLESS ASSEMBLY: Simply pull the two inner ribbons and watch the flat ribbon transform instantly into a perfectly formed, large 50mm, full and fluffy bow. Saves time and adds a touch of luxury!
PREMIUM GOLD FINISH: Crafted from high-quality, durable ribbon with a beautiful, rich metallic gold sheen. Perfect for adding a sophisticated, eye-catching finish to any gift or decoration.

HIGHLY VERSATILE DECORATION: Ideal for gift wrapping for all occasions, creating stunning wedding pew ends, decorating hampers and gift baskets, accenting flower bouquets, or adding a festive touch to Christmas decorations.
OPTIMAL SIZE: Each bow is made from a wide 50mm ribbon, resulting in a large, impactful finished bow size. The attached tails make them easy to tie and secure to any item.

CONVENIENT PACK: This essential pack contains 2 large gold pull bows, providing excellent value and ensuring you have a perfect bow ready for your next special occasion, present, or decoration project.
description: Add a touch of luxury and glamour to your next gift or event with this essential pack of Large Gold Pull Bows. Made from premium-quality 50mm wide ribbon, these bows feature a stunning, vibrant gold metallic finish that catches the light beautifully. Forget complicated tying—our pull bows are designed for instant perfection. Just hold the two small inner ribbons and pull firmly to create a large, full, and professionally-tied bow in seconds! Whether you're looking to elevate a simple birthday present, add a classic accent to a wedding centrepiece, finish off a lavish gift hamper, or present a beautiful flower bouquet, these bows are the perfect solution. They are durable, reusable, and guaranteed to make your presentation unforgettable. Stock up on the ultimate finishing touch for any celebration!

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Professional Florist Quality, Reusable, Sheer Organza Finish, Tear-Resistant Ribbon, Vibrant Colour Fastness, Waterproof Material
